Describe the sequence of actions performed by the man at the start of the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a grey pullover stands before white cabinets with text overlay; at 2s, he reaches toward counter items; at 4s, he holds up a white container with green labeling; at 6s, he displays the container closer revealing a brownie image on the label.

question: Describe the process shown involving the eggs and the bowl.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a person holds a brown egg over a white square bowl; at 11s, hands crack the shell using both hands; at 16s, the egg separates into halves revealing yolks inside; at 18s, the bowl contains raw eggs while shell pieces are held.
